question: How do I reset my password?
answer: To reset your password, click 'Forgot Password' on the login page, enter your email address, and follow the instructions in the reset email we'll send you. The link expires in 24 hours.

question: Can I upgrade my plan mid-cycle?
answer: Yes! You can upgrade your plan at any time. You'll be charged a prorated amount for the remainder of your billing cycle, and the new plan takes effect immediately.

question: How do I invite team members?
answer: Go to Settings > Team Members and click 'Invite Member'. Enter their email address and select their role (Admin, Member, or Viewer). They'll receive an invitation email with a link to join.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover) and PayPal. Enterprise customers can also pay via invoice with NET30 terms.

question: Is my data encrypted?
answer: Yes, all data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 and at rest using AES-256 encryption. We follow SOC 2 Type II compliance standards.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing and click 'Cancel Subscription'. You'll retain access until the end of your current billing period. We don't offer prorated refunds for unused time.

question: Can I export my data?
answer: Yes, go to Settings > Data Export and click 'Export All Data'. You'll receive a download link via email within 24 hours containing all your data in JSON format.

question: Do you offer a free trial?
answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial with full access to all Pro features. No credit card required to start. You can upgrade anytime during or after the trial.

question: How do I integrate with Slack?
answer: Go to Settings > Integrations, click on Slack, and then 'Connect to Slack'. You'll be redirected to authorize the integration. Once connected, you can configure notification preferences.

question: What's your uptime guarantee?
answer: We guarantee 99.9% uptime with our SLA. You can monitor our current status at status.example.com. If we fall below our SLA, eligible customers receive service credits.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: Go to Settings > Account and scroll to 'Delete Account'. This is permanent and cannot be undone. All your data will be deleted within 30 days per our data retention policy.

question: Can I change my email address?
answer: Yes, go to Settings > Profile and click 'Change Email'. You'll need to verify the new email address before the change takes effect.

question: How many team members can I have?
answer: It depends on your plan: Starter allows 5 members, Pro allows 20 members, and Enterprise has unlimited members. You can view your current usage in Settings > Team.

question: Do you offer student discounts?
answer: Yes! Students and educators get 50% off any plan. Email us at education@example.com with proof of enrollment or employment at an accredited institution.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication?
answer: Go to Settings > Security and click 'Enable 2FA'. Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (we recommend Google Authenticator or Authy) and enter the 6-digit code to confirm.

question: Can I customize my workspace URL?
answer: Yes, Pro and Enterprise plans can customize their workspace URL. Go to Settings > Workspace and edit the 'Workspace URL' field. Custom URLs must be unique and 3-20 characters.

question: What happens if I exceed my usage limits?
answer: You'll receive email warnings at 80% and 100% usage. Once you hit the limit, you'll need to upgrade your plan or wait until the next billing cycle. No overage charges are applied.

question: How do I contact support?
answer: You can reach our support team via the chat widget in the bottom right corner, email support@example.com, or submit a ticket at help.example.com. Pro customers get priority support within 4 hours.

question: Can I get a refund?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for new customers. Contact support@example.com within 30 days of your first payment to request a full refund.

question: How do I transfer ownership of my workspace?
answer: Go to Settings > Workspace, scroll to 'Transfer Ownership', enter the new owner's email, and click 'Transfer'. They must be an existing Admin in your workspace.

question: Do you have an API?
answer: Yes, our REST API is available on Pro and Enterprise plans. Documentation is at api.example.com. You can generate API keys in Settings > Developers.

question: How do I archive a project?
answer: Open the project, click the three-dot menu in the top right, and select 'Archive Project'. Archived projects are read-only but remain accessible in the Archive section.

question: Can I use custom domains?
answer: Yes, Enterprise customers can use custom domains. Contact our sales team at sales@example.com to set this up. DNS configuration is required on your end.

question: How do I recover deleted items?
answer: Deleted items are moved to the Trash and retained for 30 days. Go to the Trash section, find your item, and click 'Restore'. After 30 days, items are permanently deleted.

question: What browsers do you support?
answer: We support the latest versions of Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge. Internet Explorer is not supported. For the best experience, we recommend Chrome.

question: How do I set up SSO?
answer: SSO is available on Enterprise plans. Contact your account manager or email enterprise@example.com to begin setup. We support SAML 2.0 and OAuth 2.0.

question: Can I import data from another tool?
answer: Yes, we have import tools for Asana, Trello, Jira, and Monday.com. Go to Settings > Import and select your platform. CSV import is also available.

question: How do I change my plan?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing and click 'Change Plan'. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Upgrades are prorated; downgrades take effect at the end of your billing cycle.

question: What's your data retention policy?
answer: Active accounts retain data indefinitely. After account deletion, data is retained for 30 days for recovery, then permanently deleted. Backups are retained for 90 days.

question: How do I set up webhooks?
answer: Go to Settings > Webhooks and click 'Add Webhook'. Enter your endpoint URL and select which events to listen for. We'll send a POST request with event data to your URL.

question: Can I white-label the product?
answer: Yes, Enterprise customers can white-label with custom branding, logos, and colors. Contact sales@example.com to discuss white-labeling options and pricing.

question: How do I view my invoices?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing and click the 'Invoices' tab. You can download PDFs of all past invoices. We also email invoices to your billing email address.

question: Do you offer training?
answer: Yes! We offer free webinars every Tuesday. Enterprise customers get dedicated onboarding sessions and ongoing training. Check our training calendar at learn.example.com.

question: How do I add a credit card?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing, click 'Payment Methods', then 'Add Card'. Enter your card details. You can save multiple cards and set a default payment method.

question: What's the difference between Admin and Member roles?
answer: Admins can manage billing, invite/remove members, and access all workspace settings. Members can create and edit content but can't modify workspace settings or billing.

question: How do I set up email notifications?
answer: Go to Settings > Notifications and customize your preferences. You can choose to receive notifications for mentions, assignments, comments, and updates. Email, in-app, and Slack options available.

question: Can I restore a previous version?
answer: Yes, we maintain version history for 90 days on Pro plans and indefinitely on Enterprise plans. Open the item, click 'Version History', select a version, and click 'Restore'.

question: How secure is your infrastructure?
answer: We use AWS infrastructure with multi-region redundancy, automated backups, DDoS protection, and 24/7 security monitoring. Annual penetration testing and SOC 2 Type II certified.

question: Do you have a mobile app?
answer: Yes, we have iOS and Android apps available in the App Store and Google Play. Download the 'ExampleApp' app and sign in with your existing credentials.

question: How do I create a backup?
answer: Enterprise customers can schedule automatic backups in Settings > Backups. Manual backups can be created by clicking 'Create Backup Now'. Backups are stored for 1 year.

question: What happens during scheduled maintenance?
answer: We perform maintenance during off-peak hours (Sundays 2-4 AM EST) and announce it 72 hours in advance via email and status page. Most maintenance has zero downtime.

question: How do I configure permissions?
answer: Go to Settings > Permissions to set workspace-wide defaults. For project-specific permissions, open the project and click 'Share' to configure who can view, edit, or admin.

question: Can I schedule reports?
answer: Yes, Pro and Enterprise plans can schedule automated reports. Go to Reports, configure your report, click 'Schedule', and set the frequency (daily, weekly, monthly) and recipients.

question: How do I bulk upload users?
answer: Go to Settings > Team Members and click 'Bulk Import'. Download the CSV template, fill it with user data, and upload. You can import up to 500 users at once.

question: What's your cookie policy?
answer: We use essential cookies for authentication and functionality, plus optional analytics cookies. You can manage preferences in the cookie banner or at Settings > Privacy.

question: How do I enable guest access?
answer: Open a project, click 'Share', and enable 'Guest Access'. This generates a read-only link you can share with anyone. Guests don't need an account but can't edit.

question: Do you support GDPR compliance?
answer: Yes, we're fully GDPR compliant. We have a DPA available, support data subject requests, and our servers are in EU regions for EU customers. See our privacy policy for details.

question: How do I set up IP whitelisting?
answer: IP whitelisting is available on Enterprise plans. Contact your account manager or email security@example.com with your IP ranges. Allow 2 business days for setup.

question: Can I customize fields?
answer: Yes, Pro and Enterprise customers can create custom fields. Go to Settings > Custom Fields, click 'Add Field', and choose from text, number, date, dropdown, or checkbox types.

question: How do I troubleshoot login issues?
answer: First, clear your browser cache and cookies. Try resetting your password. If using SSO, contact your IT admin. Still stuck? Email support@example.com with your username and error message.

question: What's your SLA for Enterprise customers?
answer: Enterprise customers get 99.95% uptime SLA, 1-hour critical issue response, dedicated account manager, and priority support. Custom SLAs available for large deployments.

question: How do I deactivate a user?
answer: Go to Settings > Team Members, find the user, click the three-dot menu, and select 'Deactivate'. Deactivated users retain their data but can't log in. Reactivation is instant.

question: Can I filter by custom date ranges?
answer: Yes, use the date picker in any filter view and select 'Custom Range' to enter specific start and end dates. Saved filters remember your custom range.

question: How do I enable audit logs?
answer: Audit logs are automatically enabled for Enterprise plans. View them at Settings > Security > Audit Logs. Logs show all actions taken by users and can be exported as CSV.

question: What file types can I upload?
answer: We support images (JPG, PNG, GIF), documents (PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX), videos (MP4, MOV), and archives (ZIP). Max file size is 100MB on Starter, 500MB on Pro, 2GB on Enterprise.

question: How do I set a custom theme?
answer: Go to Settings > Appearance and choose between Light, Dark, or Auto modes. Pro users can customize accent colors. Enterprise customers can upload custom CSS for full white-labeling.

question: Do you offer a startup program?
answer: Yes! YC-backed startups and similar programs get 12 months free on Pro. Apply at startup.example.com with proof of program participation.

question: How do I merge duplicate accounts?
answer: We can't automatically merge accounts due to data integrity. Export data from one account, import to the other, then delete the duplicate. Contact support for assistance.

question: Can I limit storage per user?
answer: Enterprise plans support per-user storage quotas. Contact your account manager to configure limits. Users are notified when approaching their quota.

question: How do I set up recurring tasks?
answer: Open any project, click 'Add Task', and enable 'Recurring'. Choose daily, weekly, monthly, or custom intervals. Each completion creates the next instance automatically.

question: Can I export to Excel?
answer: Yes, go to any list view, click the export icon, and select 'Excel (XLSX)'. Exports include all visible columns and applied filters. Downloads start immediately.

question: What's the maximum team size?
answer: Starter plans support up to 5 users, Pro supports 20, and Enterprise has no limit. Need more on Pro? Upgrade to Enterprise or contact sales for custom pricing.

question: How do I reset 2FA if I lost my device?
answer: Use one of your backup codes from initial 2FA setup. No backup codes? Contact support@example.com with photo ID verification. We'll disable 2FA so you can set it up again.

question: Can I customize email templates?
answer: Enterprise customers can customize email templates including logos, colors, and footer text. Contact your account manager or email branding@example.com to get started.

question: How do I track time on tasks?
answer: Click any task, then click 'Start Timer' in the top right. We track time automatically. Stop when done. View time reports in Analytics > Time Tracking.

question: Do you support multi-factor authentication?
answer: Yes, we support TOTP-based 2FA (Google Authenticator, Authy), SMS 2FA (Pro+), and hardware keys like YubiKey (Enterprise). Enable in Settings > Security.

question: How do I create templates?
answer: Create a project with your desired structure, click the three-dot menu, and select 'Save as Template'. Templates appear when creating new projects.

question: Can I import from Notion?
answer: Yes, export your Notion workspace as Markdown or HTML, then go to Settings > Import > Notion and upload the export file. We'll convert and import your data.

question: What's your password policy?
answer: Passwords must be at least 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols. We enforce password rotation every 90 days for Enterprise customers and check against common breach databases.

question: How do I set task dependencies?
answer: Open a task, click 'Add Dependency', and select the blocking task. The dependent task is locked until blockers complete. Dependency chains show in Gantt view.

question: Can I use Markdown?
answer: Yes, all text fields support Markdown including headers, lists, code blocks, links, and images. Click the Markdown icon for a formatting guide.

question: How do I configure Slack notifications?
answer: After connecting Slack (Settings > Integrations > Slack), choose which channels receive notifications. You can filter by project, priority, or assignee.

question: What's the API rate limit?
answer: Pro plans get 1,000 requests/hour. Enterprise gets 10,000 requests/hour. Rate limit headers show your remaining quota. Contact sales for higher limits.

question: How do I duplicate a project?
answer: Open the project, click the three-dot menu, and select 'Duplicate'. Choose whether to include tasks, team members, and attachments. Duplication takes 1-2 minutes for large projects.

question: Can I set up approval workflows?
answer: Yes, Enterprise customers can create multi-step approval workflows. Go to Settings > Workflows to define approval chains, required reviewers, and automatic routing rules.

question: How do I track changes?
answer: All changes are logged automatically. Click any item and select 'Activity Log' to see who changed what and when. Enterprise plans can export activity logs.

question: Do you offer priority support?
answer: Pro customers get 4-hour response times. Enterprise gets 1-hour critical issue response plus a dedicated Slack channel and account manager. Standard plans get 24-hour support.

question: How do I set up calendar sync?
answer: Go to Settings > Integrations > Calendar and connect Google Calendar, Outlook, or Apple Calendar. Tasks with due dates appear on your calendar automatically.

question: Can I add custom statuses?
answer: Yes, Pro and Enterprise plans support custom statuses. Go to Settings > Statuses, add your custom status, choose a color, and set whether it's active or completed.

question: What's your incident response time?
answer: We aim for 15-minute detection and 1-hour mitigation for critical incidents. Status updates post every 30 minutes at status.example.com. Post-incident reports published within 48 hours.

question: How do I bulk delete items?
answer: Select multiple items using checkboxes, click 'Actions', and select 'Delete'. Items move to Trash and can be restored for 30 days.

question: Can I customize dashboard widgets?
answer: Yes, click 'Edit Dashboard' and drag widgets to rearrange. Add widgets by clicking '+' and choosing from charts, lists, calendars, and timers. Save custom layouts.

question: How do I enable dark mode?
answer: Go to Settings > Appearance and select 'Dark Mode' or 'Auto' (follows system preference). Dark mode is available on all plans.

question: What regions are you available in?
answer: We have data centers in US East, US West, EU (Frankfurt), and Asia Pacific (Singapore). Enterprise customers can choose their region. Data never leaves your selected region.

question: How do I share read-only access?
answer: Open any project and click 'Share'. Choose 'Viewer' role to grant read-only access. Viewers can see and comment but can't edit or delete.

question: Can I set up email forwarding?
answer: Yes, each project gets a unique email address. Forward emails there and they become tasks. Find the address in Project Settings > Email Integration.

question: How do I view deleted items?
answer: Click 'Trash' in the left sidebar to see all deleted items from the last 30 days. Select items to restore or permanently delete them.

question: Do you support Zapier?
answer: Yes, our Zapier integration supports 500+ apps. Connect via Settings > Integrations > Zapier. Pro and Enterprise plans get unlimited Zaps.

question: How do I configure single sign-on?
answer: SSO setup requires Enterprise plan and IT admin access. Email enterprise@example.com with your IdP details (Okta, Azure AD, OneLogin). Setup takes 3-5 business days.

question: Can I set priority levels?
answer: Yes, all plans support High, Medium, and Low priorities. Enterprise plans can create custom priority levels with auto-escalation rules.

question: What's your backup frequency?
answer: We perform incremental backups every 6 hours and full backups daily. Backups are stored in geographically separate regions with 30-day retention.

question: How do I add attachments?
answer: Click any task or comment and drag files directly or click the attachment icon. Files upload and attach automatically. All file types supported up to your plan's size limit.

question: Can I automate task assignments?
answer: Yes, Enterprise plans support automation rules. Example: auto-assign tasks with 'bug' tag to QA team. Configure in Settings > Automation.

question: How do I see my team's workload?
answer: Go to Analytics > Workload to view tasks by assignee, capacity charts, and overallocation warnings. Drag-drop tasks to rebalance workload.

question: What happens to data after I cancel?
answer: You have 30 days to export your data after cancellation. After 30 days, we permanently delete all workspace data. Export before canceling to keep a copy.

question: How do I create subtasks?
answer: Open any task and click 'Add Subtask'. Subtasks inherit parent tags and assignees by default. Progress rolls up to the parent task automatically.

question: Can I use custom domains for emails?
answer: Enterprise customers can configure custom email domains (tasks@yourcompany.com). Requires DNS configuration. Contact your account manager for setup.

question: How do I filter by multiple criteria?
answer: Click 'Filter', add your first criteria, then click '+' to add more. Filters combine with AND logic. Save frequently used filters for quick access.

question: Do you offer phone support?
answer: Enterprise customers with 50+ users get phone support with dedicated hotline. Pro and Starter plans have email and chat support only.

question: How do I set up reminders?
answer: Open any task, click 'Reminders', and choose when to be reminded (1 day before, morning of, custom). Reminders send via email, push, and in-app notifications.

question: Can I embed content?
answer: Yes, paste links to YouTube, Figma, Loom, Google Docs, and more. We auto-embed rich previews. Enterprise customers can configure additional embed sources.

question: What's the search syntax?
answer: Search supports quotes for exact match ("bug fix"), assignee:name, status:done, created:2024-01-01, and tag:urgent. Combine multiple operators with spaces.

question: How do I move tasks between projects?
answer: Select tasks, click 'Move', and choose the destination project. Comments and attachments move with the task. Original project members lose access unless added to new project.

question: Can I set up cost tracking?
answer: Enterprise plans support budget tracking. Set project budgets in Settings, log costs to tasks, and view burn rate in Analytics > Budgets.

question: How do I create saved views?
answer: Apply filters and sorting, then click 'Save View'. Name it and choose whether to share with team. Saved views appear in the left sidebar for quick access.

question: Do you have keyboard shortcuts?
answer: Yes, press '?' to view all shortcuts. Common ones: 'C' create task, 'S' search, '/' focus search, 'E' edit selected task. Full list at help.example.com/shortcuts.

question: How do I see project timelines?
answer: Click 'Timeline' or 'Gantt' view to see tasks plotted on a calendar. Drag to adjust dates. Dependencies show as connecting lines between tasks.

question: Can I restrict file downloads?
answer: Enterprise plans can disable downloads per project or workspace-wide. Configure in Settings > Security > File Access. Viewing in-browser remains available.

question: What's your change log policy?
answer: We publish release notes weekly at changelog.example.com. Subscribe to get updates via email. Breaking API changes announced 30 days in advance.

question: How do I batch edit tasks?
answer: Select multiple tasks with checkboxes, click 'Actions', and choose 'Bulk Edit'. You can change assignee, status, priority, tags, or due dates for all selected items.

question: Can I set up office hours?
answer: Yes, go to Settings > Notifications > Quiet Hours to disable notifications outside working hours. Set your timezone and work schedule. Emergency notifications override quiet hours.

question: How do I use labels vs tags?
answer: Tags are workspace-wide and used for categorization. Labels are project-specific and used for workflow states. Both support colors and filtering.

question: Do you support scrum boards?
answer: Yes, enable 'Scrum Mode' in project settings. This adds sprint planning, story points, burndown charts, and velocity tracking. Available on Pro and Enterprise plans.

question: How do I archive completed projects?
answer: Open project settings, click 'Archive Project'. Archived projects move to the Archive section and become read-only. Unarchive anytime by clicking 'Restore'.

question: Can I see who's viewing a task?
answer: Yes, active viewers appear as avatars in the top right of any task. Hover to see names. This requires real-time collaboration (all plans).

question: What's your disaster recovery plan?
answer: We maintain hot backups in 3 geographic regions, automated failover with 99.9% uptime SLA, and quarterly disaster recovery drills. RTO is 4 hours, RPO is 6 hours.

question: How do I create task checklists?
answer: Open a task, click 'Add Checklist', and enter items. Press Enter for new items. Check off as you complete. Progress shows in task card (3/5 items complete).

question: Can I limit who can invite users?
answer: Yes, Enterprise plans can restrict invitations to Admins only. Configure in Settings > Permissions > Member Invitations.

question: How do I set up milestone tracking?
answer: Create a task and enable 'Milestone' in task settings. Milestones appear on timelines with a diamond icon and can trigger notifications when reached.

question: Do you support SCIM provisioning?
answer: Yes, Enterprise plans support SCIM 2.0 for automated user provisioning and deprovisioning. Works with Okta, Azure AD, and OneLogin. Contact enterprise@example.com for setup.

question: How do I use the mobile app offline?
answer: The mobile app caches recent data for offline access. You can view tasks, make edits, and add comments. Changes sync when you reconnect.

question: Can I create custom reports?
answer: Yes, Pro and Enterprise plans have a report builder. Choose dimensions (assignee, status, project), metrics (count, time spent), and filters. Export to PDF or Excel.

question: What's your uptime history?
answer: View our uptime history at status.example.com. We maintain 99.97% actual uptime over the past 12 months. All incidents are documented with root cause analysis.

question: How do I set up @mentions?
answer: Type '@' followed by a name in any comment or description. They'll receive a notification. Mention teams with @team-name. All users can be mentioned.

question: Can I reorder tasks manually?
answer: Yes, drag and drop tasks to reorder in list view. Custom ordering is saved per view. Sort by due date, priority, or created date to override manual order.

question: How do I track sprint velocity?
answer: Enable Scrum Mode, assign story points to tasks, and complete sprints. Velocity chart shows points completed per sprint and calculates average velocity automatically.

question: Do you offer volume discounts?
answer: Yes, teams with 50+ users get volume pricing. Contact sales@example.com for a custom quote. Non-profits and education institutions get additional discounts.

question: How do I view activity across all projects?
answer: Go to Dashboard > Activity Feed to see recent updates across your entire workspace. Filter by project, user, or activity type.

question: Can I use custom emojis?
answer: Enterprise workspaces can upload custom emoji packs. Upload in Settings > Customization > Emoji. Max 100 custom emojis per workspace.

question: What's your cookie retention period?
answer: Session cookies expire after 24 hours of inactivity. Analytics cookies expire after 1 year. You can clear cookies anytime in Settings > Privacy.

question: How do I enable guest commenting?
answer: Share a task or project with guest access enabled. Guests can comment without an account. Enable in Share settings > 'Allow guest comments'.

question: Can I schedule tasks to auto-publish?
answer: Yes, create a task and set 'Publish Date' in advanced settings. Task remains hidden until the scheduled date. Available on Pro and Enterprise plans.

question: How do I link related tasks?
answer: Open a task, click 'Related Tasks', and select or search for tasks to link. Links are bidirectional and appear in both tasks' detail views.

question: Do you support OAuth login?
answer: Yes, sign in with Google, Microsoft, GitHub, or Apple ID. Enable in Settings > Authentication. SSO users can't use OAuth (SSO takes precedence).

question: What's your CCPA compliance status?
answer: We're fully CCPA compliant. California users can request data access, deletion, or opt-out of data sales (we don't sell data). Email privacy@example.com for requests.

question: How do I create form-based task intake?
answer: Go to Project Settings > Forms and create a custom intake form. Share the form link externally. Submissions automatically create tasks in your project.

question: Can I set up conditional formatting?
answer: Yes, create rules to highlight tasks based on criteria. Example: turn overdue tasks red, high priority tasks orange. Configure in View Settings > Conditional Formatting.

question: How do I export time tracking data?
answer: Go to Analytics > Time Tracking, apply date range and filters, then click 'Export'. Choose CSV or Excel. Includes task, assignee, duration, and timestamps.

question: Do you have a terraform provider?
answer: Yes, our Terraform provider supports workspace, project, and user management. Documentation at terraform.example.com. Available for Enterprise customers only.

question: How do I set capacity limits per user?
answer: Go to Analytics > Workload and set max tasks or hours per user. We highlight overallocated users. Auto-assignment respects capacity limits (Enterprise only).

question: Can I use LaTeX in comments?
answer: Yes, wrap LaTeX in $$ delimiters for block math or $ for inline. Example: $E = mc^2$. Renders automatically in comments and descriptions.

question: What's your zero-trust security model?
answer: We implement zero-trust with device verification, location-based access policies, and continuous authentication. Configure in Settings > Security > Zero Trust (Enterprise only).

question: How do I configure commit integration?
answer: Connect GitHub/GitLab in Settings > Integrations. Reference tasks in commit messages with #TASK-123. Commits appear in task activity automatically.

question: Can I set up auto-archiving?
answer: Yes, Enterprise plans support auto-archive rules. Example: archive projects 90 days after completion. Configure in Settings > Automation > Archive Rules.

question: How do I use comparison mode?
answer: Select two items, right-click, and choose 'Compare'. Shows side-by-side diff of fields, comments, and attachments. Great for finding changes between versions.

question: Do you support hardware security keys?
answer: Yes, we support FIDO2/WebAuthn hardware keys like YubiKey and Titan. Register in Settings > Security > Hardware Keys. Requires 2FA to be enabled first.

question: How do I batch import from CSV?
answer: Go to Project Settings > Import > CSV. Download template, fill with your data, and upload. We map columns automatically or let you customize field mapping.

question: Can I create task templates?
answer: Yes, create a task with your desired structure, click the three-dot menu, and select 'Save as Template'. Use templates when creating new tasks.

question: What's your penetration testing schedule?
answer: We conduct annual third-party penetration tests and quarterly internal security audits. Reports available to Enterprise customers under NDA via your account manager.

question: How do I set up cascading permissions?
answer: Enterprise plans support permission inheritance. Set workspace defaults, override at project level, and override at task level. Most restrictive permission wins.

question: Can I use custom fonts?
answer: Enterprise customers with white-labeling can upload custom fonts. Supports WOFF2 format. Upload in Settings > Branding > Typography.

question: How do I track external stakeholders?
answer: Add external stakeholders as Guests (free, read-only) or Observer role (can comment but not edit). Manage in Project Settings > External Access.

question: Do you support GraphQL?
answer: Yes, our GraphQL API is available at api.example.com/graphql. Documentation and playground at graphql.example.com. Available on Pro and Enterprise plans.

question: How do I enable commit-level permissions?
answer: Enterprise plans support granular version control. Configure in Settings > Permissions > Version Control to require approval for changes to specific fields or projects.

question: Can I set up time-based access?
answer: Yes, grant temporary access with expiration dates. Share settings include 'Access expires on' option. Users automatically lose access after expiration.

question: What's your log retention policy?
answer: Activity logs: 90 days (Pro), 1 year (Enterprise). Audit logs: 1 year (Enterprise only). Access logs: 30 days. Export logs for longer retention.

question: How do I create cross-project dependencies?
answer: Open a task, add dependency, and search across all projects. Cross-project dependencies show on timeline views and send notifications when blockers complete.

question: Can I limit login by IP address?
answer: Yes, Enterprise plans support IP allowlisting. Configure in Settings > Security > IP Restrictions. Users outside allowed IPs are blocked from login.

question: How do I use portfolio view?
answer: Go to Dashboard > Portfolio to see all projects with progress, health status, and resource allocation. Filter by team, status, or date range.

question: Do you support comment threading?
answer: Yes, all comments support threaded replies. Click 'Reply' on any comment to start a thread. Collapse/expand threads independently.

question: What's your vendor security questionnaire?
answer: Download our security questionnaire responses, SOC 2 report, and penetration test summary at security.example.com. Enterprise customers get dedicated security reviews.

question: How do I configure data residency?
answer: Enterprise customers select data residency during onboarding. We support US, EU, UK, Canada, and APAC regions. Data never leaves your selected jurisdiction.

question: Can I create approval gates?
answer: Yes, Enterprise plans support approval gates in workflows. Tasks must pass approval before moving to next status. Configure required approvers and voting thresholds.

question: How do I set up budget alerts?
answer: Go to Project Settings > Budget, set your limit, and configure alerts at 50%, 75%, and 90%. Alerts send to project admins and budget owners.

question: Do you have a CLI tool?
answer: Yes, install with 'npm install -g example-cli'. Supports task creation, querying, bulk operations, and CI/CD integration. Documentation at cli.example.com.

question: How do I enable comment moderation?
answer: Enterprise plans can require comment approval. Configure in Settings > Moderation. Admins approve/reject comments before they're visible to the team.

question: Can I use custom task IDs?
answer: Yes, configure custom ID format in Project Settings > Task IDs. Use prefixes (PROJ-123) and custom numbering. IDs must be unique within workspace.

question: What's your mean time to resolution?
answer: Critical bugs: 4 hours average. High priority: 24 hours. Medium: 3 days. Low: 1 week. Enterprise customers get faster SLAs per contract.

question: How do I track external dependencies?
answer: Add external dependencies as notes on tasks with status tracking. We don't integrate external systems directly, but you can link to Jira, Asana, etc.

question: Can I disable specific integrations?
answer: Yes, Admins can disable integrations workspace-wide in Settings > Integrations. Click the three-dot menu on any integration and select 'Disable'.

question: How do I use AI suggestions?
answer: Our AI suggests assignees, due dates, and tags based on task content. Appears as blue suggestions when creating tasks. Click to accept or ignore. Pro+ only.

question: Do you support session recording?
answer: Enterprise plans can enable session recording for audit and training. Recordings capture UI interactions (not content) for 30 days. Configure in Settings > Security.

question: How do I create automation recipes?
answer: Go to Settings > Automation > Create Recipe. Choose trigger (task created, status changed), conditions, and actions (assign, notify, update fields). Test before enabling.

question: Can I require task descriptions?
answer: Yes, Enterprise plans can enforce required fields. Go to Settings > Required Fields and select which fields are mandatory for task creation.

question: What's your change management process?
answer: Major changes go through staged rollout (5% → 25% → 50% → 100% over 2 weeks). Breaking changes announced 30 days ahead. Rollback within 1 hour if issues detected.

question: How do I set up sentiment analysis?
answer: Enterprise plans with AI features can enable sentiment analysis on comments. Shows mood trends over time. Configure in Analytics > Sentiment (beta feature).

question: Can I use regex in filters?
answer: Yes, advanced filters support regex for text fields. Use the 'matches pattern' operator and enter your regex. Example: '^BUG-\d+' for bug ticket IDs.

question: How do I track compliance requirements?
answer: Create compliance tasks with required evidence attachments. Set up approval workflows for sign-offs. Use audit logs to prove completion. Available on Enterprise plans.

question: Do you offer bug bounty?
answer: Yes, our bug bounty program is at hackerone.com/exampleapp. Rewards range from $100 to $10,000 depending on severity. Responsible disclosure required.

question: How do I enable real-time co-editing?
answer: Real-time co-editing is automatic on all plans. Multiple users can edit the same task simultaneously. Changes sync instantly with conflict resolution built-in.

question: Can I set up geofencing?
answer: Enterprise plans support location-based access. Configure allowed countries/regions in Settings > Security > Geofencing. Blocks access from unauthorized locations.

question: What's your responsible AI policy?
answer: AI features are opt-in, transparent about what data is used, and never train on customer data. Full policy at ai.example.com/responsible-ai.

question: How do I configure email digest frequency?
answer: Go to Settings > Notifications > Email Digests. Choose instant, hourly, daily, or weekly digests. Set quiet hours to avoid late-night emails.

question: Can I use conditional webhooks?
answer: Yes, set conditions on webhooks (only trigger if status=done AND priority=high). Configure in Settings > Webhooks > Advanced Filters.

question: How do I track OKRs?
answer: Enable OKR mode in workspace settings. Create objectives with key results. Track progress with automatic rollup. Quarterly check-ins and scoring built-in.

question: Do you support Mermaid diagrams?
answer: Yes, use Mermaid syntax in code blocks for flowcharts, sequence diagrams, and more. Renders automatically in comments and descriptions.

question: How do I limit concurrent sessions?
answer: Enterprise plans can limit users to 3 concurrent sessions. Configure in Settings > Security > Session Management. Oldest session terminates when limit exceeded.

question: Can I create public roadmaps?
answer: Yes, enable 'Public Roadmap' in project settings. Generates a shareable URL showing planned features without exposing internal details. Customize what's visible.

question: What's your third-party audit frequency?
answer: Annual SOC 2 Type II audits, quarterly internal audits, and annual penetration testing. ISO 27001 certified. Reports available to Enterprise customers.

question: How do I use resource leveling?
answer: Go to Analytics > Resource Leveling. Our algorithm detects overallocation and suggests task rescheduling to balance workload. Apply suggestions or adjust manually.

question: Can I set up task aging alerts?
answer: Yes, create automation rules for stale tasks. Example: notify owner if task unchanged for 7 days. Configure in Settings > Automation > Aging Rules.

question: How do I configure content security policy?
answer: Enterprise plans can set custom CSP headers. Configure in Settings > Security > CSP. Useful for additional embed restrictions and XSS protection.

question: Do you support dark web monitoring?
answer: Enterprise plans include dark web monitoring for leaked credentials. We scan breach databases and alert if workspace emails appear. Configure in Settings > Security.

question: How do I enable watermarking?
answer: Enterprise plans can watermark downloaded files with user email and timestamp. Configure in Settings > Security > File Watermarking to prevent unauthorized sharing.

question: Can I create calculated fields?
answer: Yes, Enterprise plans support formula fields. Example: total_cost = hours * rate. Create in Settings > Custom Fields > Formula. Supports basic math and date functions.

question: What's your source code escrow policy?
answer: Enterprise customers with 500+ users can request source code escrow. Contact enterprise@example.com for escrow agreement terms and pricing.

question: How do I use natural language dates?
answer: Type dates naturally: 'tomorrow', 'next Friday', '2 weeks from now', 'end of month'. We parse and convert to actual dates automatically.

question: Can I require approval for deletions?
answer: Yes, Enterprise plans can require Admin approval before deleting projects or critical tasks. Configure in Settings > Permissions > Deletion Approval.

question: How do I track SLA compliance?
answer: Set SLA targets in project settings. We track time-to-first-response and time-to-resolution. View compliance metrics in Analytics > SLA Dashboard.

question: Do you support SAML assertions?
answer: Yes, our SSO implementation supports custom SAML assertions for role mapping and attribute-based access control. Configure with your IdP during SSO setup.

question: How do I configure retention policies?
answer: Enterprise plans can set automatic deletion for old data. Example: delete closed tasks after 2 years. Configure in Settings > Data Retention with legal hold support.

question: Can I use progressive disclosure?
answer: Yes, configure which fields show by default vs. 'Show More'. Simplifies task creation. Configure in Settings > Form Layout > Progressive Disclosure.

question: What's your encryption key management?
answer: We use AWS KMS with automatic key rotation. Enterprise customers can bring your own key (BYOK) or use customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK).

question: How do I track technical debt?
answer: Create a 'Tech Debt' tag or project. Estimate effort and impact. Use scoring (effort × impact) to prioritize. Track reduction over time in Analytics.

question: Can I set up smart notifications?
answer: Yes, enable Smart Notifications in Settings. Uses ML to learn your preferences and only notifies for relevant updates. Reduces notification volume by ~60%.

question: How do I use workload forecasting?
answer: Go to Analytics > Forecast to see predicted team capacity and workload for next 90 days. Based on historical velocity and current commitments.
